items.description: Digest initial stress tests and capture ratios; flag problematic names and protective names
Query larger ticker pool to source substitutes and hedges
Deep-dive 2-3 red-flag longs (e.g., CELH, ODD, IPAR) and 2 shorts that squeeze (e.g., COTY, SPB) via ticker data
Construct Portfolio V1: de-risk high-beta longs, diversify longs into resilient, low down-capture names; re-balance shorts away from squeeze-prone names; enforce ~30% net long
Test V1 with stress_test and get_upside_downside_ratios; record max loss, captures, attribution
Analyze V1; identify remaining drivers of worst-scenario drawdown and over-correlation; adjust concentration
Construct Portfolio V2: tweak weights, swap 2-4 positions based on V1 learnings; maintain ~30% net long
Test V2 with stress_test and get_upside_downside_ratios; compare vs V1; track improvements
Construct Portfolio V3: further refine shorts for robustness across credit and rate shocks; add decorrelated longs; tighten concentration
Test V3 with stress_test and get_upside_downside_ratios; verify max loss trending toward <10%, down capture <15%, up capture >40%
Construct Portfolio V4 (if needed): fine-tune exposures to hit targets; validate across multiple scenarios
Final validation: confirm ~30% net long, counts ~15-20 longs and 10-15 shorts, improvements documented
